geometryContract.result: The authored material reconstruction does not change the topology-exact procedural embroidery result.

authoredShaderContract.baseColor: The Geometry Attribute node's FACE-domain RGB col value feeds Principled Base Color. The evaluated payload preserves one RGB record per realized vertex/corner and the browser binds that exact col buffer without averaging it to a scalar.

bump.implementation: The browser reuses the shared Blender-compatible Wave and derivative Bump shader core after applying the authored Generated-coordinate POINT mapping.

browserVerification.status: The durable authored capture reports Topology counts match Blender at 188,934 vertices / 188,160 faces, and the authored stitch material compiled without WebGL warning/error messages.

captureEnvironment.source: Blender 5.1's bundled CC0 studio.exr on both renderers
captureEnvironment.calibration: The browser intensity compensates for Eevee Standard/Medium High Contrast versus Three ACES exposure and transmission-energy differences. It changes capture illumination only; the authored material constants and evaluated geometry remain unchanged.

quantitativeComparison.interpretation: The matched local camera and environment replace the former undefined black transmission render. Blender's surface is 99.93% white pixels, so correlation against that nearly constant signal is ill-conditioned; MAE and mean luminance are the meaningful appearance measures. The remaining 0.9092 silhouette IoU records sub-pixel stitch/fuzz placement and raster differences rather than a topology-count mismatch.

dependencyStabilization: The supplied scene contains an intentional dependency cycle: hat front reads embroidery while embroidery shrinkwrap reads hat front. The Blender reference pipeline freezes the exact evaluated 60,105 / 59,680 front shell before evaluating embroidery, then evaluates the source object with authored transforms intact and detaches a local-space snapshot only for presentation.

missingAuthoredTextureBinaries.result: These external files are not packed in send nodes hat_download.blend and were not present in the supplied Node Dojo pack or Downloads search. The bill/front exact textured appearance therefore remains source-data blocked; their geometry roots are exact and retain their Workbench references.

remaining: Embroidery now has a reproducible Blender-authored reference, shared studio environment, exact procedural topology, and quantified WebGL appearance. Hat bill/front geometry is exact, but exact fabric/logo shading cannot be completed without the seven external image binaries listed above.
